# admin should be able to edit and delete exercise and content from lesson editor Lesson Blocks
# 🐞 Bug Report
## 1. Title
admin should be able to edit and delete exercise and content from lesson editor Lesson Blocks
## 2. Environment
- Environment: dev
## 3. Preconditions
_None specified_
## 4. Steps to Reproduce
go to lesson editor in admin, scroll to Lesson Blocks, the list exists with no optio to edit or delete.
- add trash icon which deletes the exercise/content.
- add edit icon which sends the admin to edit the actual exercise / content
## 5. Expected Result
_Not specified_
## 6. Actual Result
_Not specified_
## 7. Priority
🟡 P2 — Medium
## 8. Reproducibility
always
